curation_notes: Patch commit 72a47f3 identified from advisory reference free5gc/nef@72a47f3 (merge of PR #22). Only 1 non-test source file changed: internal/sbi/processor/pfd.go (+1/-1). The fix replaces problemDetails.Cause (nil in the errPfdData branch) with problemDetailsErr.Detail (the locally constructed struct). Location derived from the patch diff: the vulnerability is in PatchIndividualApplicationPFDManagement at line 622. Checked sibling files (pfdf.go, ti.go, callback.go, oam.go) in the same directory — all use locally constructed non-nil problemDetails variables in their error branches, so no sibling vulnerabilities exist. Vulnerability class null-deref confirmed: CWE-476 matches the nil pointer dereference on problemDetails.Cause.
